# nextjs-convex-conversion skill

Auto trigger keywords:

- NextJS Convex migration
- convert Convex schema
- map Convex query mutation action
- replace Convex backend
- move from Convex to Go backend
- Strata L1 L2 L3 selection
- Convex subscriptions replacement
- NextJS API parity conversion

Use this skill when converting an existing NextJS plus Convex app to this backend template while preserving architecture boundaries, API behavior, and staged rollback-safe cutover.
